issues.objection: 7.21 ships a concrete diagnostic an engineer could actually use. The concrete_scenario names specific tooling and a real role-shape; the falsifiability field forecloses the specific misreading hostile readers would supply. Quotable line: "Whatever stack the engineer commits to with disciplined attention, the substrate of that stack rewards the commitment.…" Counter-example carves out where the analog does NOT apply. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims a personal divine agency (vidadhāmy aham — I make firm); engineering analog stays at structural-pattern scope. Counter-example explicitly carves out structurally-inappropriate technique-fit so the analog does not collapse into 'commit to anything.'

notes: Hostile-engineer test for 7.21: would a senior reading this verse mock it as Sanskrit-flavoured productivity content? No. The verse names a discipline (or pathology) with operational specificity. PASS.
